plugin_desc: Westermo 工业以太网交换机专用 SNMP 采集模板（WESTERMO-SW6-MIB，企业号 16177）。除标准 IF-MIB 64 位 HC 接口流量外，额外采集 Westermo WeOS 私有 OID 的设备健康指标：CPU 使用率（直接以百分比上报）、主内存（已用 + 空闲，KB，用量按 已用/（已用+空闲）推导）、机箱温度（℃）与电源状态（经 telegraf processors.enum 归一为 1=正常/2=异常）。Westermo 工业交换机为无风扇被动散热设计，故风扇为 N/A。适用品牌型号——Westermo WeOS 工业网管交换机（Lynx/Falcon/RedFox/Viper 系列，企业号 16177）。
name: Switch

metrics.name: device_cpu_usage
metrics.description: CPU utilisation of the Westermo industrial switch (WESTERMO-SW6-MIB, reported directly as a percentage).

metrics.name: interface_ifHCInOctets
metrics.description: This metric indicates the average rate of bytes received over the past 5 minutes, measured in bytes per second, from the 64-bit IF-MIB ifHCInOctets counter (ifXTable).

metrics.name: interface_ifHCOutOctets
metrics.description: This metric calculates the average rate of bytes sent over the past 5 minutes, measured in bytes per second, from the 64-bit IF-MIB ifHCOutOctets counter (ifXTable).

metrics.name: device_memory_used
metrics.description: Used memory of the Westermo industrial switch in bytes (WeOS used memory, KB*1024).

metrics.name: device_memory_free
metrics.description: Free memory of the Westermo industrial switch in bytes (WeOS free memory, KB*1024).

metrics.name: device_memory_usage
metrics.description: Memory utilisation of the Westermo industrial switch, derived as used/(used+free).

metrics.name: device_temperature_celsius
metrics.description: Chassis temperature of the Westermo industrial switch in degrees Celsius (WeOS chassis temperature).

metrics.name: device_psu_state
metrics.description: Power-supply state of the Westermo industrial switch, normalised to 1=normal / 2=abnormal.

metrics.name: snmp_uptime
metrics.description: This metric indicates the uptime of the device since the last restart. By monitoring the uptime, network administrators can understand the stability and reliability of the device and identify potential reboot or failure issues.
